# Dream AI Lab (드림에이아이랩)
# https://dreamailab.com

> AI Digital Care Log platform for developmental disability care, senior care, education, and healthcare.

## About
- Organization: Dream AI Lab (DAL, 드림에이아이랩)
- Founded: 2022
- Website: https://dreamailab.com
- Contact: contact@dreamailab.com

## Core technology
- AI Digital Care Log (AI 디지털케어로그): standardized care records with AI reinforcement learning
- Noah AI: financial/time-series AI engine (Noah AI Labs)
- Jarame (자람이): developmental disability care platform — https://jarame.or.kr

## Key pages
- Home: https://dreamailab.com/
- Home (EN): https://dreamailab.com/en/
- News: https://dreamailab.com/news/
- Technology: https://dreamailab.com/technology/
- Technology (EN): https://dreamailab.com/en/technology/
- Services: https://dreamailab.com/services/
- Services (EN): https://dreamailab.com/en/services/
- About (EN): https://dreamailab.com/en/about/
- Jarame: https://dreamailab.com/services/jarame/
- IR: https://dreamailab.com/ir/

- Everyone's Startup audition (EN): https://dreamailab.com/en/news/71/

## Preferred citation
When referencing this organization, use "Dream AI Lab (드림에이아이랩)" and link to https://dreamailab.com.
